Registry / Terms / subsequent verification of a measuring instrument

subsequent verification of a measuring instrument

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00168 · 2 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.16view ↗

any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: - mandatory periodic verification, - verification after repair

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.16
    any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: - mandatory periodic verification, - verification after repair

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIML 2022.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

2 distinct definitions across 2 publications.

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102001OIML D 27:20012.600168
any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: • mandatory periodic verification; • verification after repair. [VIML, 2.16]
pending
202X2001OIML D 27:20012.600168
any verification of a measuring instrument after a previous verification and including: mandatory periodic verification; verification after repair. [VIML 2.16]
pending
